title: Platinum Winner -- Build on Redis Hackathon
description: The Pattern: Machine Learning NLP meets VR/AR. Knowledge discovery using AI and novel UX elements, all powered by Redis -- real-time data fabric turned into knowledge fabric. Outperformed Nvidia ML pipeline for BERT QA inference on CPU.

title: MedGemma Competition -- Knowledge-Grounded Personalised Medicine
description: Production-ready clinical decision support using MedGemma with Terraphim Knowledge Graph grounding. Rust multi-agent architecture with 543 tests passing, 18/18 evaluation cases grounded. KG catches hallucinated drug doses (10x overdose prevention).

title: Best Student Paper Award -- ISSPA 2007
organisation: International Conference on Information Sciences, Signal Processing and its Applications
description: Emitter Geolocation using fusion of TDOA Data with a Particle Filter. Co-authored with R.F. Ormondroyd.

title: Codility Golden Award -- Calcium 2015 Challenge
description: Golden Award for algorithmic problem solving in the Calcium 2015 Challenge.

title: Chaos Legion -- Data Compliance with AI/ML
description: How to achieve data compliance using AI and machine learning. Demonstrated GDPR and PCI DSS non-compliance detection on Raspberry Pi.

title: Patent GB 1815423.7 -- Secure Distributed Data Storage
description: Led a team to prototype and patent novel technology for secure distributed data storage. Blockchain-inspired architecture.

title: TOGAF 9 Certified
description: Certified in TOGAF 9 Foundation and Certified. Enterprise Architecture methodology, ADM phases, and content metamodel.
